trial_type: Type of trial: CLOSE, DISTANT, FILLER, REPEAT
stim_list: Stimulus file identifier (concatenation of listno and list_version)
itemno: Item number from the grand stimuli list
arousal: Arousal rating of the word combination
concreteness: Concreteness rating of the word combination
imageability: Imageability rating of the word combination
meaningfulness: Meaningfulness rating of the word combination
cosine: Cosine similarity to the first presentation
